steps.title: Compare the two views
steps.content: Text 1 criticizes Asimov's flat characters. Text 2 responds that this feature should not simply be treated as a flaw because Asimov wanted to show historical forces over centuries, making individual characterization less central.

steps.title: Reject unsupported replies
steps.content: Choice A claims the flatness applies to some books but not Foundation, which Text 2 does not say. Choice B introduces historians' styles, which Text 2 never compares. Choice C says Text 2 disagrees about character quality, but Text 2 instead defends minimal characterization as purposeful. The remaining response matches that defense. The answer is D.
